reviews.review_description:
If you find ya cannot grab/rotate the top circle, its a bug in the game & it requires a fresh install of the game, devs haven't been able to replicate the issue/therefore a fix may not come or atleast anytime soon, myself & my friends have all encountered it though, other then that its a fun game/time, 

My only request is you add the dino skins that we can then apply after we have completed a expert run, (possible unique coloured skin aswel for a specific in game challenge of your choosing or something) its cool as is but applying the skin after the fact seems like a obvious request especially if playing in MR because that just takes the experience to a whole other level, 

4stars from me, if we get the skins then you earn the final Star rating from me

developer_response.body:
Thanks for updating the review and for the detailed feedback.
About the rotation/top circle bug: we still haven’t been able to reproduce it on our side.
For dino skins, that’s a good suggestion and it’s already on our list. It’s not something we can add immediately, because it has quite a high production cost for us, but we definitely want to explore it for a future update.
Thanks for the support !

reviews.review_description: This game is genuinely the most calming and relaxing yet super fun game Ive played maybe ever, i love every bit of it from the all the species they have to just the way the game is set up it’s just perfect. I just wish they had more dinosaurs in the base version of the game although it’s perfectly fine if they add more in add-ons to the game, but what I think the game really needs is more niche dinosaurs, all the dinosaurs they have are big names everyone’s heard but man if they just came out with an acrocanthosaurus or something unique and yet unheard like that, I think that would really make a positive impact on the game. Cause it’s such a unique dinosaur but then again you would be truly surprised and learning about it as you go along because most likely you’ve never even heard of it. Sure your learning lots while constructing the other species but you know what the Dinosaur is and what it’s gunna look like. But yet again those awesome niche dinosaurs would be an amazing addition to the game. Thanks for this spectacular game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the kind words and the feedback!

We hear you, more niche and lesser-known dinosaurs would be a great addition, and Acrocanthosaurus is a very cool suggestion. I’ve shared this with the team, and we’ll look into adding more varied species in future updates.

Feel free to join our Discord, we’d love to hear more species suggestions from the community!
https://discord.gg/nYexabswWn

reviews.review_description:
Really enjoyed this game. Works great, lots of fun and I'm 63 years old.  I reviewed it on my YouTube page: VR Game Reviews for those 50 and up. I review VR games for those 50 and up on YouTube and Facebook. 
Today I got a note from YouTube saying the song in the background of this game has a copyright infringement. I looked up the song, and it says that it is royalty free song, but the creator is complaining to YouTube. 
Copyrighted content has been detected in your video "225) Le Dino Labo - VR Game Review - For those 50 and up". The visibility of your video is not impacted, but you can no longer monetize it. The copyright owner is now either monetizing it or receiving analytics about it. 
Content used
 Ripples - Tamuz Dekel	Updated April 8, 2026
 Content owners: Artlist Ltd
Content type: Audio

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the comment and the video, really appreciated 🙏
Great to see players from all generations enjoying the game.
About the music: we have a commercial license for use in the game, but it doesn’t cover reuse on YouTube outside of our channels, so that’s likely why you got the claim. Sorry about that.
Unfortunately this is outside of our control, a possible workaround is to record without music since it’s mostly ambient. Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_title: Exactly what I imagined it would be
reviews.review_description: It's a bit like a jigsaw puzzle picking the correct bone to put in the right place but it's very satisfying. You don't need to release the bone to see if its correct it will pull away from your controller/fingers and go into place. Finishing the model and seeing it scale up to life size fills you with the same awe and wonder as seeing the real thing in a museum. A perfect app for a perfect price. Opening little bags and having a collection of bones fall on the table and scattering them around is brilliant - is thought this would be a bit too much like puzzling places but limited to dinosaurs but it's different. Highly recommend. I'd love an option to put a skin on the dinosaur as well, and maybe different bone materials (like metal).

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the thoughtful review! 🦖 We’re really glad the assembly and life-size reveal gave you that museum-like sense of wonder. And great ideas about skins and bone materials. We’ll definitely keep them in mind as we continue expanding the experience!

reviews.review_description:
Suggestions

I'd like the piece I'm holding to be able to be rotated with the joystick.

I'd also like to be able to rotate the dinosaur model with the joystick when I'm not holding any pieces.

I would like to be able to join pieces together before transferring them to the model

It would be interesting if, upon completion of a model, it animated and moved.

I would like to have all the pieces from the beginning

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for these suggestions, they make a lot of sense. Some of them were already on the team’s roadmap, and others are now part of our ongoing reflection.

If you’d like to continue the discussion and share more ideas, feel free to join our Discord, we’re always happy to talk with players and pass feedback to the dev team.
bit.ly/ledinolabo

reviews.review_title: A very cozy and educational experience!
reviews.review_description:
Who would've thought assembling dinosaur puzzles was such a cozy experience?

It's so therapeutic that I could, in fact, stay for hours building and seeing them in real scale inside my house, and to be honest, that's wild! I might need a bigger room to fit some of these dinosaurs!

If you are a puzzle fan and enjoy games like Puzzling Places, for the price, this is a no-brainer! Go get it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 🦖 We’re really happy you’re enjoying the cozy side of rebuilding dinosaurs and yes, some of them do need a very big living room 😄

Really appreciate the support!

reviews.review_description: Recently got this game. I find it an excellent way of relaxing with a bit of Dinosaur building. Love the idea of new DLC being added. Would really love it if that have some modern day species in the app also. Things like whales, mammals, reptiles and birds would be an excellent addition. I know it’s dinosaur based but to be able to build a dog or killer whale would also be entertaining.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the great review  🙏
And thanks for the suggestion, we’ve thought about expanding beyond dinosaurs, it’s something we’d love to explore in the future 👀
Feel free to join our Discord and share more ideas with us 
👉 discord.gg/c4SYygE7zc

reviews.review_description:
I'm absolutely obsessed with this game already,  as a huge fan and nerd about dinosaurs this game was mind blowing.  Getting to put together the skeleton on my own and even see it to full scale! An absolute 10/10 experience.

- Note to developer(s) This was a truly amazing game! I look forward to hopefully seeing more dinosaurs added in the future!

developer_response.body:
We’re amazed by all the great feedback, thank you so much! It really means a lot to the team.
We’re currently rushing to bring new dinosaurs to the game, and we’re also working on improvements based on community wishes and feedback. 🦖

reviews.review_title: Wasn't expecting much but very polished
reviews.review_description: I wasn't aware of this until a game key was offered on the FB Meta Giveaway page. I lost the giveaway so I bought it since this price point is hard to resist. I've only built one dino but so far I am very impressed.  It's not really a true puzzle like Puzzling Places because there are outlines showing what pieces go where. I was disappointed by this at first, but quickly realized (as I'm sure the devs did) that I have no knowledge whatsoever about dino anatomy and trying to do it blind would get pretty frustrating lol. The difficulty levels, like PP, change the number of bones you have to work with. I finished the pteranodon and set up the full-scale skeleton in my office. The grin on my face was probably dino-sized, especially when I noticed the shadow on the floor. Nice touch!  I'm saving the T-rex for last, of course. This is a great super chill experience and well worth the price.

developer_response.body:
You perfectly understood the idea behind the design, we wanted the experience to stay relaxing and educational. 
Happy to hear the life-size Pteranodon made you smile and great choice saving the T-Rex for last! 
Thanks for the thoughtful feedback, and enjoy the rest of the lab.🦴🦖

reviews.review_title: I May Have Created a Dino… Oops
reviews.review_description:
If you’ve ever looked at a dinosaur and thought, “Yes… but what if I built it?” then this is for you. 
This is a lovely chilled game where you gradually build a dinosaur, bringing prehistoric creatures back to life right in front of you.  As you build each part you can learn facts and when you complete you can then go full scale and see just how big they were.

The controls are really intuitive, no tutorial needed, there are several dinosaurs to build with a further three coming soon.  So at the current price point you will not be disappointed.  I really enjoyed building the Tyrannosaurus Rex and look forward to dropping back in to start on the others.  Well done devs, this is great and I look forward to seeing where you take it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the early review and for exploring the game!
More dinos are coming soon.
Happy dino weekend! 🦖

reviews.review_description:
Elegant. A middle class bourgeois luxury item. This app has Granville Island Toy Company vibes. The app is a treat. The graphics are gentle and beautiful.

Zosu VR apps does fully fleshed out dinosaurs in mixed reality. This app has a rich look.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the kind words, 🙏
Glad you enjoyed the look and feel of the experience 🦖
More content coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
I love these kinds of experiences. A short experience but one that you'll keep going back to show friends. Definitely one to have in your collection.

Some requests.

The full life size looks a bit rubbish in my living room. Could you add a back drop that goes under it and extends out of the living room. Keeping it in mixed reality. Like Home Sports game does with mixed reality 

The trailer it shows then moving when will this be added please. 

Really excited for updates 🙂.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words! 🦖 We’re really glad you’re enjoying the experience and that it’s something you want to show to friends — that means a lot to us.

Thanks as well for the thoughtful suggestions. The idea of adding a mixed-reality backdrop to better showcase life-size dinosaurs is a great one, especially for smaller rooms. Feedback like this really helps us improve the experience.

As for the moving dinosaurs shown in the trailer, we’re actively working on expanding the experience with new features and updates. We’re excited to keep building on Le Dino Labo, and your feedback is a big part of shaping what comes next.

Thanks again for playing and for the support! 🙂

reviews.review_description:
Sometimes you install a game with so much anticipation & this certainly was one of those experiences.
Who doesn’t love dinosaurs, what an amazing way to learn more about them & the build concept is just phenomenal.
The bag that arrives is just so clever, rip it open and your first parts fall on to the table, let the assembling begin.
Every piece looks sharp & picking them is on point.
Suitable for ages young & old, I’m having the best time, I love all different puzzle games, there is no game like this on the meta quest, it deserves its place at the top of the puzzle tree.
Get it now, you will not be disappointed, it’s a puzzle game like no other.
Outstanding, bravo RealCast.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the wonderful review!
We’re really happy to see that the effort the team put into every detail is being enjoyed by players.
Have fun with the first batch of dinosaurs, more are coming soon! 🦖
And perfect timing for a dino weekend, with the new dinosaur series just released on NX produced by Spielberg.

reviews.review_description: This game is delightful! It's really satisfying to put the dinosaurs together as the bones snap together with a satisfying click! As a bonus, this game can be played while sitting down thanks to the adjustable table. Overall, I've found it to be a relaxing game and would recommend!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind review! 🦖

We’re really glad you’re enjoying the relaxing building experience and that the bone snapping feels satisfying. That’s exactly the feeling we hoped to create. Happy to hear the adjustable table makes it comfortable to play seated, too. Thanks for recommending the game!

reviews.review_description: I love all puzzles, and watching the dinosaurs come together was very cool. After you build the dinosaur you can click on the information buttons to learn all about the dinosaurs. I really enjoyed the game. The game is very well designed. Thank you Meta Quest Promotions, Giveaways and Referrals, and Real Cast. Your talent and hard work does not go unnoticed!!  Thank you
I really like this. No bugs/glitches which is rare lately. Smooth construction of the models - Also has little info points about the dino you are building. I bought the DLC too.

developer_response.body:
Glad you’re enjoying it, and great to see you grabbed the DLC too 🤩
More dinos are already on the way 🦖
Feel free to join our Discord 👉 https://discord.gg/c4SYygE7zc

reviews.review_description: Dino Labo offers a hands-on VR experience where you assemble dinosaur fossils in an interactive lab. It’s a simple, accessible and engaging way to discover paleontology in virtual reality, especially for beginners and younger audiences. GREAT APP!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your support! 🙌🦖
We’re really happy you’re enjoying the experience and the educational side of Dino Labo. We’re excited to bring you more fossils and content very soon!

reviews.review_description: what i'm thinking they could add is they could add a raptor and also they could add a  triceratops also they could add a diplodocus and for final the could add brachiosaururs.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the great suggestions, love this list! 🦖

Good news: some of these dinosaurs are already on the way 👀
👉 One of them is available very soon, and another is coming in the update next week!

If you want to share more ideas or follow what’s coming next, feel free to join our Discord:
👉 discord.gg/c4SYygE7zc

reviews.review_description:
I was looking forward to the release and it delivered!
Opening a new bag of bones feels great every single time. The building is fun but the real deal for me are the life size models. Overall just a great experience for a small pricetag. 
Can't wait for future Updates and dlcs. 
My kids will love this!
Udate: My kids can't put it down and are really amazed. Thanks for the great experience.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the great feedback!
We’re especially happy to hear that your kids love it too. 🦴🦖
More dinosaurs and updates are already in the works, so the lab will keep growing. Thanks again for supporting Le Dino Labo!

reviews.review_description: ￼ ￼ this is very good. I’m quite impressed. But can I make some recommendations? adding a voice that explains parts of the dinosaurs when you touch the information boxes would be amazing?  You know a bit liking ocean rift a voice that explains the creatures. I have found sometimes the tracking is a bit off and could be frustrating for younger children. Could you add an easy mode with arrows pointing to which bones need to go where ￼and which way around might be good idea as using the controllers getting the angles and twisting your wrists with the current tracking is a little frustrating to sometimes get them in place even for me an adult . Also, I think when the dinosaurs go full size adding different backgrounds in the virtual reality mode would be cool as, well, like rocks Cretaceous Scenery so it’s not just a blue screen. this is a really good effort and I would definitely pay more money if these improvements could be made.  And maybe oneday in the future some animation and the full skin of the dinosaurs would be cool eventually.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the thoughtful feedback! We’re really glad you’re enjoying the experience and it’s great to hear it’s promising.
Some of the features you mentioned are actually already part of our roadmap, and others are great ideas that we’ll definitely note in our “dino book” for future improvements. 
It’s a pleasure to see players imagining how the game could evolve and become even better. If you’d like, feel free to join our Discord so we can keep the conversation going and hear more of your ideas! 🦖
bit.ly/ledinolabo

reviews.review_description: I almost fell asleep it’s so relaxing if I have a bad day W game keep working on it never believe the hate, this is unbelievable bro.

developer_response.body:
Thanks 🙏
Glad you’re feeling the good vibes, more new stuff coming soon 🦖

reviews.review_description: It is a low cortisol and big brain game cant wait for future updates

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind words 🙏
Really glad you enjoyed the relaxing & thoughtful vibe, that’s exactly what we were aiming for with Le Dino Labo.
We’re already working on new updates, with fresh content and new dinosaurs coming very soon 🦖
Feel free to join us on Discord, we’d love to have you there!
👉 discord.gg/c4SYygE7zc

reviews.review_description: So I bought the game and finished it in a day with the hardest level an I wanted to do more but you have to pay more can you please add more to the game for free it would be nice if you could

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for playing, and congrats on finishing the game in Expert Mode! 🦖

We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed it and that you want to play more. We’re a small studio, and we’ve made a big effort to keep the base game at a reasonable price while continuing to improve and expand it. In fact, our latest major update arrived just this week with new improvements and content.

We understand the wish for more free content, and we’ll keep improving the game over time. Also, if you can wait a bit, the game and first two DLCs should be part of the next sale starting July 20, so it may be a good time to grab more content at a lower price.

You can also use our code for 10% off all Realcast games ans DLCs:
RC10-A01CA9

Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: So at first I had thought this was just a dinosaur 3D puzzle, which it is, and I was looking forward to it, as the price is essentially the same as a Puzzling Places dlc. However, as I started to put together the first leg (which you can place the table and puzzle pieces in MR, so you can watch TV while working on the dinosaur), I discovered that its also a educational puzzle as well (a little ! appeared when I had finished the first leg), it told me about the dinosaurs' leg, so it's educational as well. Oh, and you get to open the bag with each section of the dinosaur individually packaged. Then, when you are done building your dinosaur, you can specify that you want to see a life size view of the dinosaur, well suddenly it was in my living room, partially in my garage and out my window. It was great seeing a life-size bone structured dinosaur (just as you might see in a museum). Right now. There are only five puzzles, but on the second page, it shows coming soon. If you are a fan of Puzzling Places, dinosaurs, or even some education facts on them, then I would recommend this. It doesn't take long to build them, but its good fun as you do.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the great review!
We’re really happy you enjoyed both the puzzle and the educational side of the experience. 
Seeing a life-size dinosaur appear in your living room is one of our favorite moments too. More dinosaurs are already planned for the lab, thanks for the support! 🦴🦖

reviews.review_description: I’ve just tried out this brand new app, and I really love it. It’s a completely unique type of puzzle where you assemble bone fragments to reconstruct different dinosaurs. It’s super fun, and I’m looking forward to the future improvements that the developers have already announced.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind review! 🦖

We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying the experience and that the concept feels unique to you. Reconstructing dinosaurs bone by bone was exactly the kind of calm, hands-on puzzle we wanted to create.

There’s definitely more coming. New dinosaurs, features, and improvements are already in the works. Thanks again for the support and for being part of the early journey of Le Dino Labo!

reviews.review_title: Great dino nerd game with some flaws
reviews.review_description:
First off, this is exactly what I've wanted in VR. The ability to examine dinosaur skeletons in 3D VR at full scale is something I've wanted for YEARS! Please keep developing this game!

I've just completed the Spinosaurus on maximum difficulty. Overall, it is a fun and relaxing experience. I had a couple of hiccups with the hand tracking stopping right after I pressed the start menu or picked up a bone, but with a re-click of the controllers it was able to start tracking again. Once it was working, the hand tracking felt very natural and responsive. The zipper bags of bones, a la Legos, is a nice touch.

On the Spinosaurus skeleton itself -- I notice it is based on a pre-2020 Ibrahim et al. version, without the famous paddle tail and with forcibly pronated forelimbs to make it quadrupedal. I would prefer, especially as the information panels mention a paddle tail, a more up-to-date model. The inclusion of belly ribs/gastralia would also be nice to see. The current pose could be adapted to a swimming pose to avoid having to bend the radius and ulna to force a pronated hand position. 

Regardless, putting it together and seeing the skeleton blow up to full size was really cool. I look forward to continuing development of this game and putting together the other skeletons.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for this amazing and detailed feedback 🙏
It means a lot, especially coming from someone who clearly knows about paleontology. We’re genuinely glad the experience resonates with connoisseurs and paleo nerds like you 🙂

Regarding the Spinosaurus: you're absolutely right. We’ve had similar feedback about the current version being based on a pre-2020 reconstruction, and we’ll definitely look into integrating a more up-to-date version in a future update or DLC.

We’re actively continuing development with improvements, new features, and more dinosaurs on the way. In fact, the next batch of 3 new dinosaurs is coming next week 🦖

If you’d like to share more thoughts or follow the evolution of the game, feel free to join us on Discord:
👉 discord.gg/c4SYygE7zc

reviews.review_description:
This is a fantastic puzzle game love dinosaurs 🦕 and done 4 out of five dinosaurs. 
Hope you are bring more dinosaurs fossils out. Didn't  know you could change the difficulty of play i just left as it is.

developer_response.body:
That’s awesome, thanks for playing! 🦕
Which difficulty level did you use?
You can also join our Discord to share your builds and experiences with other players.
bit.ly/ledinolabo

reviews.review_description: it's fun relaxing dinosaur puzzle game i wish the big dinos were the coming soon ones came out in a week or two really fun game keep updating it

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the kind words, we're glad you’re enjoying the game! 🦖

We hear you loud and clear about the bigger dinosaurs… and good news: we’re on it!
An update is coming as early as next week, with new (and bigger 👀) dinos to build and discover.

Stay tuned, your lab is about to get a lot bigger!

reviews.review_description: Very relaxing yet challenging experience.  The interface is easy to learn and building the dinosaurs piece by piece is rewarding.  I highly recommend this game!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the kind words! 🦖
We’re really happy you enjoyed building the dinosaurs. Relaxing but challenging experience was exactly our goal. More creatures and updates are already on the way to expand the lab!

reviews.review_description: Its like this game was made for me! Im super excited to see what this game can become and all the dinos that will be brought to it. I honestly had no complaints playing this!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! We’re really happy you enjoyed the game. More dinos are coming soon, happy dino weekend! 🦖

reviews.review_title: Don't even go to a museum at this point
reviews.review_description: First you have fun while building dinosaurs and you can see them at there full view.

We’re especially happy to hear that you got our intention: bringing the museum experience home, but making it interactive and fun 🦖

New updates are arriving very soon with more content, so stay tuned!

And if you’d like to share feedback or follow what’s coming next, feel free to join our Discord:

reviews.review_description: This game is super fun and satisfying to play! We can’t wait for more fossils to get added!

developer_response.body:
Love hearing that, thank you so much! 🙌🦖
We’re already working on adding more fossils, with new dinosaurs coming very soon !
